sections.paragraph: προηγέομαι [πρό, ἡγέομαι] go before, τῇ τιμῇ ἀλλήλους προηγούμενοι being ahead of one another in showing honor Ro 12:10. Some view π. as based on ἡγέομαι in the sense of ‘consider, think’ and interpret when it comes to honor let each one consider another more worthy (than oneself).
